name: The Wonderland Massacre & the Secret History of Hollywood
original_name: The Wonderland Massacre & the Secret History of Hollywood
overview: Michael Connelly takes viewers on a wild journey into the twisted story of the massacre at Wonderland Avenue on July 1, 1981 – one of Hollywood's most famous murder cases that has fascinated people for more than 40 years.

trailers.title: The Wonderland Massacre & The Secret History of Hollywood - MGM+ - Trailer
